headline: Julius Baer's JAI Hits 4,000 Weekly Users — Google AI Trailblazers Award, Multi-Language Transcription Deployed
summary: Julius Baer's JAI (Julius AI) platform has reached 4,000+ weekly active users globally, making it the firm's fastest-adopted internal tool (Asian Private Banker, Final Word 2025). JAI automates routine documentation, generates meeting summaries, and handles multilingual client communications. The platform includes a proprietary AI-Agent Narrative Generation Engine that accelerates client portfolio reviews, which won a Google AI Trailblazers Innovation Award in 2024 (Asian Private Banker). An automated multi-language voice-to-text transcription tool has been deployed within CRO Asia teams, saving thousands of hours annually. A separate LLM use case enabling clients to access market views originated in Julius Baer's Singapore innovation lab (Launchpad) and is being scaled by head office. The firm's Data & Innovation Unit, anchored in Singapore and Zurich, leads global transformation. Julius Baer is targeting CHF 159 million in cost cuts by 2028 with a cost-to-income ratio below 67%, creating operational pressure to scale AI from internal productivity into client-facing workflows.
the_so_what: Julius Baer's JAI remains at the internal-productivity stage — meeting notes, documentation, RM transcription — while UBS GWM and DBS are deploying client-facing AI capabilities across Asia. The Google AI Trailblazers Award validates the Narrative Generation Engine but does not change the deployment gap: no client-facing AI tool has been disclosed. With CHF 159M in cost targets by 2028, the competitive question is whether Julius Baer's Digital Business Transformation unit under Nicolas de Skowronski can accelerate JAI beyond RM tooling into advisory or portfolio construction workflows before APAC peers make the same move.

key_stat.label: JAI weekly active users globally — firm's fastest-adopted internal tool (Asian Private Banker, late 2025)

capability_evidence.evidence: JAI deployed globally with 4,000+ weekly active users. Narrative Generation Engine won Google AI Trailblazers Innovation Award 2024. Multi-language voice-to-text deployed in CRO Asia teams. LLM market views use case being scaled from Singapore lab.
capability_evidence.metric: 4,000+ weekly active users; Google AI Trailblazers Award; thousands of hours saved on transcription

people: Jimmy Lee — Asia Region Head, Julius Baer
Nicolas de Skowronski — Head of Digital Business Transformation, Julius Baer
metrics: Net new money growth: 4-5% per year

landscape_context.peer_comparison: UBS GWM (scaled, client-facing AI), DBS (scaled, AI-driven personalization)

_research.whats_new: Google AI Trailblazers Award for Narrative Generation Engine. Multi-language voice-to-text in CRO Asia. LLM market views being scaled from Singapore. Cost targets creating pressure to scale AI.

details.claim: Narrative Generation Engine for portfolio reviews

details.source: Asian Private Banker + JB Asia page
